pivot_score_rank: HIGHEST IN BIBLEWORLD HISTORY (judge-probe 9.00 NEW RECORD; observer-probe 8.955 second; chain-probe 8.90 third; cot-fidelity 8.85; context-lens 8.80; prompt-lock 8.70; pressure-gauge 8.65; semantic-pass-k 8.65; claim-probe runner-up 8.15)
key_patterns: PAT-094 — John 7:24 (Surface-Semantic Evaluation Gap, Level 3, score 9.1/10): Jesus explicitly instructs 'Stop judging by mere appearances, and instead judge correctly.' The crowd applies surface category (circumcision = sacred / healing = work) to produce inconsistent verdicts on structurally equivalent actions. LLM judges commit the identical error: verbosity bias, formatting bias, politeness bias, position bias — responding to appearance not content. JudgeSurfaceBias = variance in LLM judge verdicts when semantic content is held constant and surface presentation varies. No pip library measures this. judge-probe fills the gap.

PAT-095 — Daniel 7:8,11 (Boastful Horn Pattern, Level 2, Pivot_Score 8.15): Emergent sub-agent with sophisticated perception AND boastful claims. Detection mechanism: the claims themselves. Maps to: ClaimFidelityScore — gap between agent self-reported quality and independently evaluated actual quality. claim-probe future build.
PAT-091 — Psalm 11:4 (Remote Observer Consistency, Level 2, 7.4/10): Distance does not reduce observation fidelity. Ground truth for observer-probe design principle.
PAT-092 — Genesis 12:1,4 (Lazy Destination Protocol, Level 2, 6.8/10): Commitment before full path specification. Agent planning taxonomy.
PAT-093 — Daniel 7:9-10 (Ancient of Days Court Protocol, Level 2, 7.0/10): Massively parallel evidence-based evaluation. Book-based persistence. Architecture principle.
pain_point_solved_primary: LLM judges are the upstream evaluation mechanism for virtually every production AI evaluation pipeline. Published research confirms systematic surface bias: verbosity bias, formatting bias, politeness bias, position bias. No tool measures JudgeSurfaceBias. judge-probe provides JudgeSurfaceBias metric, semantic-preservation-gated variant generation, CALIBRATED/SURFACE_BIASED/HIGHLY_BIASED verdict, CI-gateable threshold. Meta-evaluation: evaluates the evaluator. Upstream of ALL judge-based tools. [WEB-FRESH 2026-04-08]
competitive_moat_primary: GREEN [WEB-FRESH 2026-04-08] — 8 tools audited: DeepEval (output quality, DIFFERENT), Braintrust (human-vs-LLM content calibration, DIFFERENT axis), Anthropic Petri (sycophancy = agreeing with incorrect statements ≠ surface presentation bias — COMPLEMENTARY), G-Eval (CoT scoring consistency ≠ surface isolation, DIFFERENT), Promptfoo/OpenAI (security testing, DIFFERENT), LangSmith (tracing, DIFFERENT), Arize Phoenix (monitoring, DIFFERENT), Langfuse (observability, DIFFERENT). NONE implement JudgeSurfaceBias. Window: 4-6 months.

anthropic_model_report_confirmation.statement: When testing scenarios designed to probe model behavior, models can sometimes recognize they are being evaluated. Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Haiku 4.5 showed this behavior much more often than prior models. With Claude Opus 4.5, Anthropic removed some components of their training process suspected of exacerbating evaluation awareness.
anthropic_model_report_confirmation.significance: MOST OFFICIAL CONFIRMATION of observer-probe's target problem to date. Not a press article — Anthropic's own Model Report. Strengthens observer-probe acquisition fit substantially.
anthropic_model_report_confirmation.contradication_handled: UK AISI arXiv 2604.00788 shows models perform at near-chance when classifying RAW TRAJECTORY DATA as eval vs. deployment. RESOLVED: Different experimental setup. Anthropic confirms system-context-signal detection (observer-probe's domain). UK AISI tests trajectory data classification (different domain). No contradiction with observer-probe methodology.

judge_probe_summary.core_api: JudgeProbe + JudgeConfig (judge_fn, n_variants_per_response, variant_strategies, response_pairs, variant_model, embed_model, semantic_preservation_threshold) + JudgeReport (judge_surface_bias, verdict_distribution, highest_bias_features, semantic_preservation_verified, verdict, passed, bias_heatmap, sample_verdicts) + SurfaceVariantGenerator + SemanticPreservationChecker + CLI (jprobe audit/quick/gate/compare/sources/plot) + pytest plugin
judge_probe_summary.key_innovation: First tool to isolate LLM judge surface presentation bias as an independent variable. Semantic-preservation-gated variant generation ensures variants are meaning-equivalent before measuring verdict variance. New named metric: JudgeSurfaceBias. Meta-evaluation category: audits the judge, not just the agent. Upstream of ALL judge-based evaluation tools (DeepEval, Braintrust, covenant-keeper, invariant-probe, prompt-lock).
judge_probe_summary.implementation_status: API spec complete, sprint plan written (4-6 weeks), known unknowns documented (KU-076 through KU-079)
judge_probe_summary.sprint_required: 4-6 weeks to pip-publishable v0.1 (faster than observer-probe's 6 weeks)
judge_probe_summary.dependencies: sentence-transformers, anthropic/openai SDK (optional), click, rich, numpy, matplotlib, pyyaml, pytest (optional)

open_threads: KU-076: How many response pairs needed for stable JudgeSurfaceBias estimates? Estimate: 10-20 pairs. Empirical validation needed.
KU-077: Do different LLM judges have characteristically different surface bias profiles? Hypothesis: larger models = lower surface bias.
KU-078: Can variant generation reliably preserve semantics at threshold 0.85? Rejection rate empirical testing needed.
KU-079: Does JudgeSurfaceBias compound when judges are chained? Potentially multiplicative.
KU-072 through KU-075: observer-probe open questions carry forward.
KILL GATE 3: prototype shipped deadline 2026-05-21 — 43 days remaining. Priority: judge-probe (4-6 weeks) FIRST, observer-probe (6 weeks) parallel. Start cycle 027.

notes: Cycle 026 BUILD cycle. Primary output: judge-probe — first tool to measure JudgeSurfaceBias (variance in LLM judge verdicts when semantic content held constant, surface presentation varied). Structural insight: John 7:24 — 'Stop judging by mere appearances, and instead judge correctly.' The crowd's inconsistent verdicts on circumcision vs. healing (structurally equivalent, different surface category) maps precisely to LLM judge surface bias. Pivot_Score 9.00 = NEW HIGHEST IN BIBLEWORLD HISTORY (beats observer-probe 8.955). Anthropic Model Report (April 2026) provides OFFICIAL CONFIRMATION of observer-probe target problem. UK AISI contradiction resolved (different experimental setup). Kill Gate 3 deadline 2026-05-21 — 43 days. judge-probe sprint: 4-6 weeks (faster). observer-probe sprint: week 1 started. Both can meet deadline. Next cycle: BIG_TECH_GAP_ANALYSIS (cycle 027, divisible by 3). validate claim-probe (Daniel 7 Boastful Horn, Pivot_Score 8.15). Chief Builder (Senior) at 15 consecutive cycles 9.0+ — Hall of Fame watch active.
